name: Empire Flippers
description: Curated marketplace for buying and selling established online businesses. Listings are vetted with verified financials.

name: Product Hunt
description: Product discovery platform. Useful for identifying trending niches, competitive landscape, and emerging tools.

name: Flippa
description: Open marketplace for buying and selling online businesses, domains, and apps. Higher volume but less curated than Empire Flippers.

name: Harmonic.ai
description: Company intelligence platform for discovering startups, tracking funding rounds, and identifying market trends.
